framework.name: NIST AI 600-1 Generative AI Profile
framework.disclaimer: NIST AI 600-1 is public domain. Shown for reference — verify against the official NIST publication.

controls.title: CBRN Information or Capabilities
controls.statement: Risk that generative AI lowers the barrier to access or synthesize harmful chemical, biological, radiological, or nuclear information or capabilities.

controls.title: Confabulation
controls.statement: Risk that the system produces confidently stated false or fabricated content (also called hallucination) that users may over-trust.

controls.title: Dangerous, Violent, or Hateful Content
controls.statement: Risk that the system produces or eases production of dangerous, violent, or hateful content, including incitement and recommendations for self-harm.

controls.title: Environmental Impacts
controls.statement: Risk from the high compute, energy, and water demands of training and operating large generative AI models.

controls.title: Harmful Bias and Homogenization
controls.statement: Risk that the system amplifies harmful bias, discriminates, or homogenizes outputs in ways that disadvantage groups of people.

controls.title: Human-AI Configuration
controls.statement: Risk from how humans and the AI system interact, including over-reliance, automation bias, misuse, and unclear roles in decision-making.

controls.title: Data Privacy
controls.statement: Risk that generative AI leaks, infers, or reconstructs sensitive personal data from training data, context, or other users.

controls.title: Information Integrity
controls.statement: Risk that generative AI degrades information integrity at scale, including confabulation, misinformation, disinformation, and deceptive synthetic content.

controls.title: Information Security
controls.statement: Risk to information security from generative AI, including prompt injection, data poisoning, model theft, and expanded attack surface.

controls.title: Intellectual Property
controls.statement: Risk that the system reproduces or infringes copyrighted, trademarked, or licensed material, or leaks proprietary training data.

controls.title: Obscene, Degrading, or Abusive Content
controls.statement: Risk that the system generates obscene, degrading, or non-consensual intimate content, including synthetic CSAM and abusive imagery.

controls.title: Value Chain and Component Integration
controls.statement: Risk arising from third-party models, data, and components integrated into the generative AI value chain, including opaque provenance.
